title: _meta
description: Reserved metadata field in MCP tool call arguments. Injected by anima, routed by tela. tela strips this before forwarding to downstream MCP servers that do not recognize it.

trace_id.description: End-to-end trace identifier. Propagated across all agent and tool calls in a single job.

event_id.description: Originating nervus event ID. Links tool calls back to the triggering event.

idempotency_key.description: For deduplication of side-effecting tool calls. Recorded in tela audit log. At-most-once enforcement is a future capability (not in v0.1).

spec_digest.description: PersonaSpec content hash. Used by tela to verify token binding.
